mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (name, folder_id, content, creator_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{folderId},#{content} ,#{creatorId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM document
is_deleted = 0
AND folder_id = #{folderId}
AND folder_id IS NULL
ORDER BY create_time DESC
